label: Portal Home
description: Developer portal — jump to any Nextra service in one click.

label: Main Application
description: Gamified learning platform with AI chat, badges, streaks, and leaderboards.

label: API Docs
description: Interactive OpenAPI documentation. Try endpoints, inspect schemas.

label: Backend API
description: C++ Drogon REST API. Authentication, gamification, notifications, AI.

label: Webmail
description: In-house webmail client for the local Postfix/Dovecot mail server.

label: Alerts Centre
description: Unified notification feed across all Nextra services.

label: DB Admin
description: PostgreSQL dashboard. Run queries, browse tables, inspect schema.

label: Package Repo
description: Browse, upload, and manage versioned packages with S3-backed storage.

label: S3 Storage
description: S3-compatible bucket browser. Upload, download, and manage objects.
